name: Refrigerator Pickles
recipeIngredient: 1 Quart Sliced Unpeeled Cucumbers, 1/4 inch thick
1/2 Cup Thinly Sliced Onions, about 4 ounces
recipeInstructions:
1 1/2 pounds, or 2 1/2 cucumbers, scrubbed, ends discarded.
Or 2 quarts crushed ice
Drain sliced cucumbers on a rack. Combine the cucumbers, onions, and garlic. Add salt; mix thoroughly. Cover with crushed ice or ice cubes. Set aside for 3 hours. Remove garlic cloves. Drain thoroughly in a colander. Pour sugar, vinegar, and pickling spices into a 3-quart saucepan. Bring to a boil. Add drained cucumbers and onion spices. If you are making refrigerator pickles:
- Heat for 15 minutes.
- Pour into hot, clean jars.
- Set jars upright to cool.
If you are instead processing these:
- Heat for 5 minutes.
- Pack loosely into clean hot pint jars to 1/2-inch of the top.
- Adjust jar lids and process in boiling water for 5 minutes, beginning to count processing time as soon as the water in the canner returns to boiling.
- Remove jars and complete seals if necessary.
- Set jars upright to cool.
